title: The signature of 'finalize()' should match that of 'Object.finalize()'
description: This rule indicates that a method named 'finalize' does not override 'Object.finalize()'. It may confuse users since they are not expected to call 'Object.finalize()'. Moreover, the Garbage Collector might not call the overload, rendering it useless.
recommendation: It's recommended to rename the method to a more appropriate name, ensuring it does not conflict with 'Object.finalize()'.
impact: Improper usage of 'finalize()' method can lead to confusion for the users and potential issues with Garbage Collection.

checks.message: The signature of 'finalize()' should match that of 'Object.finalize()'
